workflow_runs.display_title: CPI Forecast Pipeline: Update June 2026 CPI snapshot for Jul 10 release

head_commit.message:
CPI Forecast Pipeline: Update June 2026 CPI snapshot for Jul 10 release

- Headline: -0.1% MoM / 3.8% YoY (Cleveland Fed Nowcast 3.96%)
- Core: +0.2% MoM / 2.8% YoY (Cleveland Fed Nowcast 2.85%)
- Oil collapse: Brent 2, WTI 9 (Hormuz normalizing ~75%)
- 10Y yield: 4.37% (Jun 26), FOMC hawkish hold dot plot +25bp
- Bias: BELOW consensus; conviction 70
- Scenarios: Base 55% / Hot 20% / Cool 25%
- Timestamp: 2026-06-29T00:00:00Z

Research: Cleveland Fed Nowcast, EIA STEO, FRED H.15, Trading Economics
